intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content on this website (texts, images, logos, trademarks, software) is the exclusive property of Timeless SAS or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. Any reproduction, representation, or distribution without prior written consent is prohibited.

personalData.title: Personal Data
personalData.content: Timeless collects and processes personal data in accordance with its Privacy Policy and applicable data protection regulations (GDPR). For more information, please consult our Privacy Policy or contact us at legal@timeless.film.

dpa.description: This page outlines how Timeless processes personal data on behalf of its users. For a formal Data Processing Agreement (DPA), please contact us.

contact.title: Request a DPA
contact.description: To request a signed Data Processing Agreement, contact us at

scope.title: Scope of Data Processing
scope.content: Timeless processes personal data necessary for the operation of its B2B marketplace for classic and heritage films. This includes account information, transaction data, and communication records between exhibitors and rights holders.

acceptTerms.description: Our Terms of Service have been updated. Please review and accept them to continue using the platform.

acceptTerms.error: An error occurred while recording your acceptance. Please try again.

acceptSale.description: Our Terms of Sale have been updated. Please review and accept them to continue.
